name: Karyopharm Therapeutics Inc.
business: Karyopharm Therapeutics Inc. is a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing novel cancer therapies, specifically oral XPO1 inhibitors. Its lead product, XPOVIO (selinexor), is approved in the U.S. for the treatment of adult patients with multiple myeloma (in combination with bortezomib and dexamethasone after at least one prior therapy, and with dexamethasone after four prior therapies) and for relapsed or refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) after at least two lines of systemic therapy.

exposures.sentence: Our scientific expertise is based upon an understanding of the regulation of intracellular communication between the nucleus and the cytoplasm. We have discovered and are developing and commercializing novel, small molecule XPO1 inhibitor compounds that inhibit the nuclear export protein exportin 1 ( XPO1 ).

catalysts.event: Top-line data from the SENTRY Phase 3 trial evaluating selinexor in myelofibrosis
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report top-line data from the SENTRY Trial in March 2026.

catalysts.event: Top-line data from the XPORT-EC-042 Phase 3 trial evaluating selinexor in endometrial cancer
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report top-line data from this event-driven trial in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Top-line data from the SENTRY-2 Phase 2 trial in myelofibrosis with moderate thrombocytopenia
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report top-line data from all patients in the 60 mg cohort with at least 24 weeks of follow-up in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Special Meeting of Stockholders to vote on increase in authorized shares
catalysts.sentence: We have scheduled a Special Meeting of Stockholders to be held on February 18, 2026 to seek stockholder approval for an increase in our authorized shares of capital stock and common stock.
